### About
- Loves making random QOL and lib/api mods for Minecraft
- Pursuing an **AS in Software Development**
- Daily driving **Arch Linux** with **Hyprland**
- Currently playing arc raiders
- Reach me at **tysontheember@tysontheember.dev**
- Moved repos to https://git.tysontheember.dev
